queries_changed.new_query: MATCH (d:Device {device_id: $id})-[:HAS_COMPONENT]->(c:ComponentInstance) WHERE c.component_type = $ctype OPTIONAL MATCH (c)-[:INSTANCE_OF]->(e:Entity) RETURN c { .*, entity_name: e.name, entity_id: e.entity_id } AS comp
